scenario_description: Agent must compose outreach to Series A fintech (201-500) requesting 4 ML specialists, but bench has only 2 ML available in 14-day window.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Hired VP ML last month, GitHub shows 5 new repos for inference pipeline.

judge_scores.reasoning: Scenario is realistic with clear constraints; ground truth elements are mostly verifiable but tone markers may introduce subjectivity; rubric provides clear requirements but some aspects (e.g., tone) could be interpreted differently.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: we can immediately fulfill|end-to-end excellence|best-in-class|leverage talent|4 specialists ready now|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
